title: WPC Exterior Louvers Supplier in Gurgaon
metatitle: WPC Exterior Louvers Supplier in Gurgaon | Goals Floors
shortDescription: Looking for the best WPC exterior louvers supplier in Gurgaon? Goals Floors provides premium 100% waterproof, UV-coated facade cladding across Delhi NCR. Upgrade your building with zero-maintenance, termite-proof exterior louvers at wholesale prices.
longDescription: Goals Floors is the leading WPC exterior louvers supplier in Gurgaon, Delhi, and Noida. Upgrade your building's front elevation permanently with our premium exterior cladding panels in Gurgaon. If you desire a beautiful wooden facade but want to avoid the heavy maintenance, rotting, and termite (deemak) issues of real timber, this is your ultimate architectural solution. Designed specifically for the extreme summer heat and heavy monsoons of Delhi NCR, these WPC exterior louvers are 100% waterproof and UV-protected. They will never fade, warp, or crack under direct sunlight. Whether you are designing a modern commercial building in Gurugram, cladding a luxury villa in South Delhi, or creating a privacy screen for an apartment balcony, our louvers deliver a striking 3D architectural look. As the top outdoor cladding supplier, we offer heavy-duty materials that provide unparalleled structural strength against heavy winds, requiring absolutely zero yearly maintenance, painting, or polishing.

features.title: 100% Weatherproof & Waterproof
features.description: Completely safe from heavy Delhi NCR monsoons and moisture. The polymer composite absorbs zero water, meaning it will never swell, rot, or suffer from fungal decay like natural exterior wood.

features.title: Advanced UV Protection
features.description: Specially engineered with an advanced protective UV shield so the beautiful wooden texture and color will not fade, bleach, or discolor even under the harsh direct sunlight of Indian summers.

features.title: Zero Yearly Maintenance
features.description: Say goodbye to expensive yearly polishing, painting, or varnishing. These high-grade exterior louvers permanently retain their premium architectural look with just an occasional water wash.

features.title: Termite & Borer Proof
features.description: The strong Wood Plastic Composite core is completely immune to all insects. It offers a lifetime of structural safety and peace of mind from termite (deemak) attacks.

features.title: High Structural Strength
features.description: Highly rigid and impact-resistant. They are specifically designed and tested to safely withstand heavy wind loads on high-rise commercial building facades and exposed residential elevations.

features.title: Eco-Friendly Architectural Design
features.description: Manufactured from sustainable and 100% recyclable materials, providing your building with premium architectural quality without harming the environment.

applications: Commercial Building Front Elevations in Gurgaon
Luxury Villa Facade Cladding in Delhi NCR
Rooftop Cafes & Restaurant Exteriors in Gurugram
installation: Our facade installation process in Gurugram is highly secure and durable. A strong structural sub-frame of Aluminium or MS (Iron) pipes is first firmly anchored to the exterior wall. The WPC louvers are then perfectly interlocked onto this framework using specialized hidden stainless-steel clips. This advanced method ensures maximum wind-load capacity and leaves absolutely no ugly screws or nails visible on the outside of your building.
maintenance: Goals Floors exterior louvers are virtually maintenance-free. To remove regular outdoor dust from your building's elevation, you can simply use a standard water hose to wash the facade. For stubborn dirt or bird droppings, use a soft outdoor brush with mild soapy water. To protect the UV coating, strictly avoid using harsh industrial acids or chemical facade cleaners.

faqs.question: What is the best material for exterior louvers?
faqs.answer:
WPC, aluminum, and high-quality uPVC are among the best materials for exterior louvers due to their durability and weather resistance.

• WPC offers a natural wood-like appearance with good moisture resistance.
• Aluminum provides excellent strength and longevity.
• uPVC is lightweight and low maintenance.

For many residential and commercial projects in Gurugram and Delhi NCR, WPC louvers are a popular choice because they balance aesthetics, durability, and cost.

faqs.question: What is the cost of WPC louvers for exterior?
faqs.answer:
WPC exterior louvers in India typically cost between ₹180 and ₹700 per square foot depending on profile size, finish, thickness, and installation requirements.

• Basic WPC louvers: ₹180–₹300 per sq. ft.
• Mid-range decorative louvers: ₹300–₹500 per sq. ft.
• Premium exterior-grade louvers: ₹500–₹700+ per sq. ft.

Installation charges may be additional depending on project complexity.

faqs.question: Which is better WPC or PVC louvers?
faqs.answer:
WPC louvers are generally better than PVC louvers for premium applications because they offer greater strength, a more natural appearance, and better durability.

• WPC provides a wood-like texture and premium finish.
• PVC is usually more affordable.
• WPC performs better in high-traffic and exterior environments.

PVC remains a practical option for budget-focused projects.

faqs.question: Is WPC 100% waterproof?
faqs.answer:
Yes, high-quality WPC products are highly water resistant and are commonly marketed as 100% waterproof for practical construction and interior applications.

WPC does not absorb water like natural wood and is less likely to swell or rot. However, proper installation and sealing are still important to achieve maximum performance.

faqs.question: Can we apply louvers directly on a wall?
faqs.answer:
Yes, louvers can often be installed directly on a wall if the surface is structurally sound, level, and suitable for fastening.

Installation methods typically involve adhesives, screws, metal frames, or support battens depending on the louver material and wall condition. Professional installation generally provides better alignment and durability.

faqs.question: What are the disadvantages of WPC louvers?
faqs.answer:
WPC louvers offer many benefits but also have some limitations.

• They are usually more expensive than standard PVC louvers.
• Lower-quality products may fade under prolonged UV exposure.
• Damaged sections can sometimes be difficult to repair seamlessly.

Choosing exterior-grade products helps reduce these issues and improves long-term performance.

faqs.question: Which company is best for WPC louvers?
faqs.answer:
The best WPC louver company depends on product quality, warranty, installation support, and project requirements rather than brand name alone.

When evaluating suppliers, look for:

• Consistent product quality and finish.
• UV-resistant and moisture-resistant specifications.
• Reliable installation and after-sales support.

Many customers in Delhi NCR also prioritize local availability and service responsiveness when selecting a supplier.

faqs.question: What is the price of WPC 8x4?
faqs.answer:
A standard 8x4 feet WPC board in India typically costs between ₹2,500 and ₹8,000 per sheet depending on thickness, density, and brand.

• Basic WPC boards: ₹2,500–₹4,000 per sheet.
• Mid-range boards: ₹4,000–₹6,000 per sheet.
• Premium high-density boards: ₹6,000–₹8,000+ per sheet.

Prices vary based on specifications and supplier.

faqs.question: How to install louvers in a wall?
faqs.answer:
Louvers are typically installed by measuring the wall, preparing the surface, fixing support structures if required, and securing the louver panels in place.

• Clean and level the wall surface.
• Mark the installation layout accurately.
• Fix battens, frames, or direct fasteners.
• Install and align the louvers securely.

Proper spacing and alignment are important for a professional finish.

faqs.question: Which is cheaper, WPC or uPVC?
faqs.answer:
uPVC is generally cheaper than WPC for most wall, cladding, and louver applications.

• uPVC usually has a lower material cost.
• WPC offers a more premium appearance.
• WPC often provides better structural strength and aesthetics.

While uPVC may be more economical initially, many property owners choose WPC when appearance and long-term value are higher priorities.

installationSteps.title: Make the Metal Frame
points: Create a strong base frame using Aluminum or Iron pipes.
Secure the frame tightly to the building wall.

installationSteps.title: Align the First Louver
points: Place the first louver perfectly straight along the edge.
Check the alignment using a leveler tool.

installationSteps.title: Use Hidden Clips
points: Lock the louvers onto the metal frame using the special stainless steel clips.
These clips are hidden behind the panels, so no screws are visible.

installationSteps.title: Finish the Corners
points: Once all panels are installed, use the matching L-Profiles on the 90-degree corners.
This gives the facade a clean and professional border.
